title: Regularity for minimizers of degenerate, non-autonomous, orthotropic integral functionals
summary:
We prove the higher differentiability of integer order of locally bounded minimizers of integral functionals of the form \begin{equation*}
  \mathcal{F}(u,Ω):= \,\sum_{i=1}^{n} \dfrac{1}{p_i}\displaystyle \int_Ω\, a_i(x) \lvert u_{x_i} \rvert^{p_i} dx- \int_Ωω(x)u(x) dx, \end{equation*} where the exponents $ p_i \geq 2 $ and the coefficients $ a_i(x) $ satisfy a suitable Sobolev regularity. The main novelty consists in dealing with non-autonomous, anisotropic functionals, which depend also on the solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有非自治、各向异性系数的积分泛函局部有界极小化子的高阶可微性
AI.motivation: 研究非自治、各向异性积分泛函的极小化子的正则性理论，这类泛函在偏微分方程和变分法中具有重要意义，但高阶可微性结果相对较少
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间理论、变分方法、各向异性分析技术，以及系数满足的Sobolev正则性条件
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当指数p_i≥2且系数a_i(x)满足适当的Sobolev正则性时，积分泛函的局部有界极小化子具有整数阶高阶可微性
AI.significance: 扩展了各向异性泛函的正则性理论，为处理非自治、依赖解的函数提供了新的工具，在椭圆型偏微分方程和变分问题中有重要应用

title: Diffusive limit of the Boltzmann equation around Rayleigh profile in the half space
comment: To appear in Bull. Inst. Math. Acad. Sin
summary: This paper concerns the diffusive limit of the time evolutionary Boltzmann equation in the half space $\mathbb{T}^2\times\mathbb{R}^+$ for a small Knudsen number $\varepsilon>0$. For boundary conditions in the normal direction, it involves diffuse reflection moving with a tangent velocity proportional to $\varepsilon$ on the wall, whereas the far field is described by a global Maxwellian with zero bulk velocity. The incompressible Navier-Stokes equations, as the corresponding formal fluid dynamic limit, admit a specific time-dependent shearing solution known as the Rayleigh profile, which accounts for the effect of the tangentially moving boundary on the flow at rest in the far field. Using the Hilbert expansion method, for well-prepared initial data we construct the Boltzmann solution around the Rayleigh profile without initial singularity over any finite time interval.

AI.tldr: 研究Boltzmann方程在半空间中的扩散极限，构造了围绕Rayleigh剖面的解，避免了初始奇异性
AI.motivation: 研究小Knudsen数下Boltzmann方程在半空间中的扩散极限问题，边界条件包含与ε成正比的切向速度的漫反射，远场为零体速度的全局Maxwell分布
AI.techniques: 使用Hilbert展开方法，构造Boltzmann方程在Rayleigh剖面附近的解，处理边界层效应和初始奇异性问题
AI.main_theorems: 对于充分准备的初始数据，在任何有限时间区间上构造了Boltzmann方程围绕Rayleigh剖面的解，避免了初始奇异性
AI.significance: 建立了Boltzmann方程与不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程之间的严格数学联系，为边界层问题的微观-宏观对应提供了理论基础

title: A note on lifespan estimates for higher-order parabolic equations
summary: We investigate the lifespan of solutions to the higher-order semilinear parabolic equation $$u_t+(-Δ)^m u=|u|^p, \quad x \in \mathbb{R}^n, t>0 $$ with initial data. We focus on the precise asymptotic behavior of the lifespan of nontrivial solutions. By combining the test function method and semigroup estimates, we derive both upper and lower bounds for the lifespan of solutions $$T_{\varepsilon} \simeq \left\{\begin{array}{l}\varepsilon^{-\left(\frac{1}{p-1}-\frac{n}{2m}\right)^{-1}}, \,\, 1<p<p_{\text {Fuj}}, \\ \exp\left(\varepsilon^{-(p-1)}\right), \,\, p=p_{\text {Fuj}},\end{array}\right.$$ where $p_{Fuj}=1+\frac{2m}{n}$ is the critical exponent of Fujita. These estimates refine and extend the earlier results of Caristi-Mitidieri [J. Math. Anal. Appl., 279:2 (2003), 710-722] and Sun [Electron. J. Differential Equations, 17 (2010)], who obtained only upper bounds under slowly decaying initial data assumptions. In our setting, the above condition on the initial data is replaced by the assumption $L^1\cap L^\infty$, which sharpens the results of the aforementioned works.

AI.tldr: 建立了高阶半线性抛物方程解寿命的精确渐近估计，改进了Caristi-Mitidieri和Sun的先前结果
AI.motivation: 研究高阶半线性抛物方程解的寿命问题，特别是当初始数据属于L^1∩L^∞空间时，解的精确渐近行为。该问题源于Caristi-Mitidieri和Sun的早期工作，他们只得到了缓慢衰减初始数据下的上界估计。
AI.techniques: 结合测试函数方法和半群估计，推导解寿命的上界和下界。使用L^1∩L^∞空间的初始数据假设替代缓慢衰减条件。
AI.main_theorems: 得到了解寿命T_ε的精确渐近估计：当1<p<p_Fuj时，T_ε≃ε^{-(1/(p-1)-n/2m)^{-1}}；当p=p_Fuj时，T_ε≃exp(ε^{-(p-1)})，其中p_Fuj=1+2m/n是Fujita临界指数。
AI.significance: 改进了Caristi-Mitidieri和Sun的结果，将初始数据条件从缓慢衰减放宽到L^1∩L^∞空间，得到了更精确的上下界估计，对高阶抛物方程解的爆破理论有重要贡献。

title: Irreversibility condition and stability of equilibria in the inverse-deformation approach to fracture
summary: We derive the irreversibility condition in fracture for the inverse-deformation approach using the second law of thermodynamics. We consider the problem of brittle failure in an elastic bar previously solved in (Rosakis et al 2021). Despite the presence of a non-zero interfacial/surface energy, the third derivative of the inverse-deformation map is discontinuous at the crack faces. This is due to the presence of the inequality constraint ensuring the inverse strain is nonnegative and the orientation of matter is preserved. A change in the material location of a crack results in negative entropy production, violating the second law. Consequently, such changes are disallowed giving the irreversibility condition. The inequality constraint and the irreversibility condition limit the space of admissible variations. We prove necessary and sufficient conditions for local stability that incorporate these restrictions. Their numerical implementation shows that all broken equilibria found in (Rosakis et al 2021) are locally stable.

AI.tldr: 利用热力学第二定律推导了断裂不可逆条件，证明了裂纹材料位置变化会导致负熵产生，从而违反第二定律。
AI.motivation: 研究断裂力学中的不可逆性问题，特别是针对弹性杆的脆性破坏问题，旨在从热力学第二定律出发推导断裂的不可逆条件。
AI.techniques: 采用逆变形方法，结合热力学第二定律分析熵产生，使用不等式约束确保逆应变非负和物质方向保持，通过变分方法处理容许变分空间限制。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 裂纹材料位置变化会导致负熵产生，违反热力学第二定律；2. 推导了断裂的不可逆条件；3. 建立了包含这些限制的局部稳定性充要条件；4. 数值验证了所有断裂平衡态都是局部稳定的。
AI.significance: 为断裂力学提供了严格的热力学基础，将不可逆性条件与热力学第二定律直接联系起来，对理解断裂过程的物理本质和数值模拟具有重要意义。

title: Parabolic problems whose Fujita critical exponent is not given by scaling
summary:
This paper investigates the (fractional) heat equation with a nonlocal nonlinearity involving a Riesz potential: \begin{equation*} u_{t}+(-Δ)^{\fracβ{2}} u= I_α(|u|^{p}),\qquad x\in \mathbb{R}^n,\,\,\,t>0, \end{equation*} where $α\in(0,n)$, $β\in(0,2]$, $n\geq1$, $p>1.$ We introduce the Fujita-type critical exponent $p_{\mathrm{Fuj}}(n,β,α)=1+(β+α)/(n-α)$, which characterizes the global behavior of solutions: global existence for small initial data when $p>p_{\mathrm{Fuj}}(n,β,α),$ and finite-time blow-up when $p\leq p_{\mathrm{Fuj}}(n,β,α)$.
  It is remarkable that the critical Fujita exponent is not determined by the usual scaling argument that yields $p_{sc}=1+(β+α)/n$, but instead arises in an unconventional manner, similar to the results of Cazenave et al. [Nonlinear Analysis, 68 (2008), 862-874] for the heat equation with a nonlocal nonlinearity of the form $\int_0^t(t-s)^{-γ}|u(s)|^{p-1}u(s)ds,\,0\leq γ<1.$
  The result on global existence for $p>p_{\mathrm{Fuj}}(n,2,α),$ provides a positive answer to the hypothesis proposed by Mitidieri and Pohozaev in [Proc. Steklov Inst. Math., 248 (2005) 164-185]. We further establish global nonexistence results for the above heat equation, where the Riesz potential term $I_α(|u|^{p})$ is replaced by a more general convolution operator $(\mathcal{K}\ast |u|^p),\,\mathcal{K}\in L^1_{loc}$, thereby extending the Mitidieri-Pohozaev's results established in the aforementioned work.
  Proofs of the blow-up results are obtained using a nonlinear capacity method specifically adapted to the structure of the problem, while global existence is established via a fixed-point argument combined with the Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev inequality.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了带Riesz势非局部非线性项的(分数阶)热方程，确定了Fujita型临界指数，揭示了其与常规标度分析不同的非传统特征。
AI.motivation: 研究带Riesz势非局部非线性项的分数阶热方程，解决Mitidieri和Pohozaev提出的假设，探索非局部非线性项对解全局行为的影响。
AI.techniques: 非线性容量方法（针对爆破结果）、不动点论证与Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev不等式结合（针对全局存在性）、Fujita型临界指数分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了Fujita型临界指数p_Fuj(n,β,α)=1+(β+α)/(n-α)，当p>p_Fuj时小初值解全局存在，当p≤p_Fuj时解在有限时间内爆破。
AI.significance: 揭示了非局部非线性项导致临界指数与常规标度分析不同的非传统现象，验证了Mitidieri-Pohozaev假设，将结果推广到更一般的卷积算子。

title: Sharp stability on the second Robin eigenvalue with negative boundary parameters
summary: In this paper, we prove a quantitative refinement of the isoperimetric type inequality for the second Robin eigenvalue with negative boundary parameters established by Freitas and Laugesen [Amer.J.Math.143 (2021), no.3, 969-994].Such new stability estimate is proved when the boundary parameter is not too far from 0.By constructing a suitable family of nearly spherical domains, we prove that the exponent for the Fraenkel asymmetry in this quantitative type inequality is sharp.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有负边界参数的二阶Robin特征值等周型不等式的定量精细化稳定性估计
AI.motivation: 研究Freitas和Laugesen建立的具有负边界参数的二阶Robin特征值等周型不等式的稳定性问题，当边界参数接近0时，需要建立定量化的稳定性估计
AI.techniques: 构造适当的近球形区域族，通过分析这些特殊区域的几何性质来证明稳定性估计的指数最优性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当边界参数不太远离0时，二阶Robin特征值等周型不等式的定量稳定性估计；2. 证明了该稳定性估计中Fraenkel不对称性指数的尖锐性（最优性）
AI.significance: 深化了对Robin特征值等周型不等式的理解，提供了定量稳定性结果，为相关谱几何问题的研究提供了新的工具和方法

title: Critical concave-convex problems in Carnot group
summary: We consider a model Dirichlet problem with concave-convex and critical nonlinearity settled in Carnot groups. Our aim is to prove the existence of two positve solutions in the spirit of a famous result by Ambrosetti, Brezis and Cerami. To this aim we use a variational Perron method combined with proper estimates of a family of functions which are minimizers of the relevant Sobolev inequality. Due to the lack of boundary regularity, we also have to be careful while proving that the first solution found is a local minimizer in the proper topology.

AI.tldr: 在Carnot群上证明了具有凹凸性和临界非线性项的Dirichlet问题存在两个正解
AI.motivation: 研究Carnot群上具有凹凸非线性项和临界指数的Dirichlet问题，推广Ambrosetti-Brezis-Cerami经典结果到非交换几何框架
AI.techniques: 变分Perron方法、Sobolev不等式极小化函数的估计、处理边界正则性缺失的技巧、局部极小化子的拓扑分析
AI.main_theorems: 在Carnot群上证明了具有凹凸非线性项和临界指数的Dirichlet问题存在两个正解，其中一个解是适当拓扑下的局部极小化子
AI.significance: 将经典椭圆问题的多解理论推广到非交换几何框架，为Carnot群上的非线性分析提供新工具和结果

title: Infinity of solutions to initial-boundary value problems for linear constant-coefficient evolution PDEs on semi-infinite intervals
summary: In this short communication, we announce an algorithmic procedure for constructing non-uniqueness counter-examples of classical solutions to initial-boundary-value problems for a wide class of linear evolution partial differential equations, of any order and with constant coefficients, formulated in a quarter-plane. Our approach relies on analysis of regularity and asymptotic properties, near the boundary of the spatio-temporal domain, of closed-form integral-representation formulae derived via complex-analytic techniques and rigorous implementation of the modern PDE technique known as Fokas unified transform method. In order to elucidate the novel idea and demonstrate the proposed technique in a self-contained fashion, we explicitly present its application to two concrete examples, namely the heat equation and the linear KdV equation with Dirichlet data. New uniqueness theorems for these two models are also presented herein.

AI.tldr: 提出构造线性演化偏微分方程初边值问题经典解非唯一性反例的算法化方法
AI.motivation: 研究四分之一平面上常系数线性演化偏微分方程初边值问题经典解的唯一性问题，旨在系统性地构造非唯一性反例
AI.techniques: Fokas统一变换方法、复解析技术、积分表示公式、边界附近正则性和渐近性质分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 提出构造任意阶常系数线性演化PDE初边值问题经典解非唯一性反例的算法化程序；2. 对热方程和线性KdV方程给出具体应用示例；3. 为这两个模型提出新的唯一性定理
AI.significance: 为线性演化PDE解的唯一性问题提供了系统化的反例构造方法，深化了对初边值问题适定性的理解，扩展了Fokas方法的应用范围

title: On a fuzzy Landau Equation: Part III. The grazing collision limit
summary: In this paper, we study the grazing limit from the non-cutoff fuzzy Boltzmann equations to the fuzzy Landau equation, where particles interact through delocalised collisions. We show the grazing limit through variational formulations that correspond to the GENERIC (General Equations for Non-Equilibrium Reversible-Irreversible Coupling) structure of the respective equations. We show that the variational formulation associated with a non-quadratic dual dissipation pair for the fuzzy Boltzmann equations converges to a variational formulation of the fuzzy Landau equation corresponding to a quadratic dissipation pair.

AI.tldr: 证明了非截断模糊Boltzmann方程到模糊Landau方程的放牧极限，通过GENERIC结构的变分公式化方法
AI.motivation: 研究粒子通过非局域碰撞相互作用的模糊Boltzmann方程在放牧极限下如何收敛到模糊Landau方程，这是从非截断Boltzmann方程到Landau方程经典极限问题的推广
AI.techniques: 使用GENERIC（非平衡可逆-不可逆耦合一般方程）结构的变分公式化方法，通过非二次对偶耗散对到二次耗散对的收敛来证明极限
AI.main_theorems: 证明了模糊Boltzmann方程的变分公式化（对应非二次对偶耗散对）收敛到模糊Landau方程的变分公式化（对应二次耗散对），从而建立了放牧极限
AI.significance: 为从非截断Boltzmann方程到Landau方程的经典极限问题提供了新的变分框架，将GENERIC结构应用于模糊动力学方程，为理解非局域碰撞系统的渐近行为提供了理论基础

title: Optimal cost for the null controllability of the Stokes system with controls having $n-1$ components and applications
summary: In this work, we investigate the optimal cost of null controllability for the $n$-dimensional Stokes system when the control acts on $n-1$ scalar components. We establish a novel spectral estimate for low frequencies of the Stokes operator, involving solely $n-1$ components, and use it to show that the cost of controllability with controls having $n-1$ components remains of the same order in time as in the case of controls with $n$ components, namely $O(e^{C/T})$, i.e. the cost of null controllability is not affected by the absence of one component of the control. We also give several applications of our results.

AI.tldr: 证明了n维Stokes系统在控制仅有n-1个分量时，零能控性的最优代价仍保持O(e^{C/T})阶，与n个分量控制的情况相同。
AI.motivation: 研究n维Stokes系统在控制分量减少时的零能控性代价问题，探讨控制分量缺失对能控性代价的影响。
AI.techniques: 建立了Stokes算子的低频率谱估计（仅涉及n-1个分量），利用该谱估计分析能控性代价。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当控制仅有n-1个分量时，Stokes系统的零能控性代价仍为O(e^{C/T})，与完整n分量控制情况同阶。
AI.significance: 揭示了Stokes系统能控性对控制分量的鲁棒性，为流体控制理论提供了重要理论支撑，具有实际应用价值。

title: Generalized Navier-Stokes equations, associated with the Dolbeault complex
summary: We consider the Cauchy problem in the band $\mathbb{C}^{n}\times[0, T], n>1,T>0$, for a system of nonlinear differential equations structurally similar to the classical Navier-Stokes equations for an incompressible fluid. The main difference of this system is that it is generated not by the standard gradient operators $\nabla$, divergence div and rotor rot, but by the multidimensional Cauchy-Riemann operator $\overline{\partial}$ in $\mathbb{C}^{n}$, its formally adjoint operator $\overline{\partial}^{*}$ and the compatibility complex for $\overline{\partial}$, which is usually called the Dolbeault complex. The similarity of the structure makes it possible to prove for this problem the theorem of the existence of weak solutions and the open mapping theorem on the scale of specially constructed Bochner-Sobolev spaces. In addition, a criterion for the existence of a ``strong'' solution in these spaces is obtained.

AI.tldr: 在复多维空间中构造了类似Navier-Stokes方程结构的微分系统，并建立了弱解存在性和强解存在准则
AI.motivation: 研究动机是将经典Navier-Stokes方程的结构推广到复多维空间，用多维Cauchy-Riemann算子及其伴随算子替代标准梯度、散度和旋度算子，探索在Dolbeault复形框架下的流体力学类比
AI.techniques: 使用多维Cauchy-Riemann算子、Dolbeault复形、Bochner-Sobolev空间构造、弱解存在性证明、开映射定理应用
AI.main_theorems: 1. 弱解存在性定理；2. 开映射定理在Bochner-Sobolev空间尺度上的成立；3. 强解存在的充分必要条件
AI.significance: 将流体力学中的Navier-Stokes方程结构推广到复分析领域，建立了复多维空间中的流体动力学类比，为复几何与偏微分方程的交叉研究提供了新框架

title: Homogenized limits of Stokes flow and advective transport in thin perforated domains
summary: We deal with the rigorous homogenization and dimension reduction of flow and transport problems posed in thin $\varepsilon$-periodic perforated layers with thickness of order $\varepsilon^α$ with $α\in (0,1)$ and therefore the thickness of the layer is large compared its porosity. The aim is the derivation of effective models for $\varepsilon\to 0 $, when the thickness of the layer tends to zero. For the flow problem we consider incompressible Stokes equations with a pressure boundary condition on the top/bottom of the layer, and the transport problem is given by reaction-diffusion-advection problem with advective flow governed from the fluid velocity from the Stokes model and different scalings for the diffusion coefficient modelling low and fast diffusion in the horizontal direction. In the limit, a Darcy-type law is obtained for the Stokes flow with Darcy-velocity depending only on the derivative of the Darcy-pressure in the vertical direction. The effective equation for the transport problem is again of diffusion-advection-type including homogenized coefficients, and with advective flow given by the Darcy-velocity and only taking place in the vertical direction. In the case of slow diffusion in the vertical direction, effective diffusion only takes place in the vertical direction, where in the case of high diffusion in horizontal direction, we obtain effective diffusion in all space directions. To pass to the limit we use the method of two-scale convergence adapted to our microscopic geometry, which is based on uniform a priori estimates. Critical parts in the derivation of the macro-models are the control of the fluid pressure, for which we construct a Bogovskii-operator for thin perforated domains, as well as the strong two-scale convergence for the microscopic solution of the transport equation, necessary to pass to the limit in the advective term.

AI.tldr: 建立了薄穿孔层中流动和输运问题的严格均匀化理论，推导出当层厚度趋于零时的有效宏观模型
AI.motivation: 研究厚度为ε^α（α∈(0,1)）的薄穿孔层中的流动和输运问题，这类结构的厚度远大于其孔隙尺寸，需要建立当ε→0时的有效宏观模型
AI.techniques: 使用适应微观几何的双尺度收敛方法，构造薄穿孔域的Bogovskii算子控制流体压力，以及输运方程微观解的强双尺度收敛技术
AI.main_theorems: Stokes流动极限得到Darcy型定律，Darcy速度仅依赖于垂直方向压力梯度；输运问题极限得到扩散-对流型方程，对流速度由Darcy速度给出且仅发生在垂直方向；慢扩散情形仅垂直方向有效扩散，快扩散情形所有方向都有有效扩散
AI.significance: 为薄穿孔层中的多尺度流动和输运问题提供了严格的数学基础，建立了微观结构与宏观有效性质之间的联系，在渗流、多孔介质传输等领域有重要应用

title: The initial-to-final-state inverse problem with unbounded potentials and Strichartz estimates
summary:
The initial-to-final-state inverse problem consists in determining a quantum Hamiltonian assuming the knowledge of the state of the system at some fixed time, for every initial state. We formulated this problem to establish a theoretical framework that would explain the viability of data-driven prediction in quantum mechanics. In a previous work, we analysed this inverse problem for Hamiltonians of the form $-Δ+ V$ with an electric potential $V = V({\rm t}, {\rm x})$, and we showed that uniqueness holds whenever the potentials are bounded and decay super-exponentially at infinity. In this paper, we extend this result for unbounded potentials. One of the key steps consists in proving a family of suitable Strichartz estimates -- including the corresponding endpoint of Keel and Tao.
  In the context of the inverse Calderón problem this family of inequalities corresponds to the Carleman inequality proved by Kenig, Ruiz and Sogge. Haberman showed that this inequality can be also retrieved as an embedding of a suitable Bourgain space. The corresponding Bourgain space in our context do not capture the mixed-norm Lebesgue spaces of Strichartz inequalities. In this paper, we give a counterexample that justifies this fact, and shows the limitations of Bourgain spaces to address the initial-to-final-state inverse problem.

AI.tldr: 该论文将初态-终态逆问题从有界势推广到无界势，通过建立Strichartz估计族并证明Bourgain空间方法的局限性
AI.motivation: 研究量子力学中初态-终态逆问题，即通过系统在固定时刻的状态（对所有初态）来重构量子哈密顿量，为数据驱动的量子力学预测建立理论框架
AI.techniques: 使用Strichartz估计族（包括Keel-Tao端点估计）、Carleman不等式类比、Bourgain空间嵌入分析，并构造反例证明Bourgain空间的局限性
AI.main_theorems: 将初态-终态逆问题的唯一性结果从有界势推广到无界势，证明合适的Strichartz估计族，并给出Bourgain空间不能捕获Strichartz不等式中混合范数Lebesgue空间的严格反例
AI.significance: 扩展了量子逆散射理论，为数据驱动的量子系统识别提供理论基础，揭示了Bourgain空间在初态-终态逆问题中的局限性，建立了与Calderón逆问题的理论联系

title: Time-periodic solutions to an energy balance model coupled with an active fluid under arbitrary large forces
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in Nonlinear Analysis: Real World Applications
summary: This article concerns time-periodic solutions to a two-dimensional Sellers-type energy balance model coupled to the three-dimensional primitive equations via a dynamic boundary condition. It is shown that the underlying equations admit at least one strong time-periodic solution, provided the forcing term is time-periodic. The forcing term does not need to satisfy a smallness condition and is allowed to be arbitrarily large.

AI.tldr: 证明了耦合二维Sellers型能量平衡模型与三维原始方程的系统在周期性强迫下存在至少一个强时间周期解
AI.motivation: 研究地球气候系统的周期性行为，通过耦合大气动力学（原始方程）与能量平衡模型来模拟气候系统的季节变化，探索在周期性外部强迫下系统是否存在稳定的周期性响应
AI.techniques: 使用动态边界条件耦合偏微分方程系统，可能涉及不动点定理、能量估计、周期解的存在性理论，以及处理非线性耦合系统的分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当强迫项为时间周期函数时，耦合系统至少存在一个强时间周期解，且强迫项不需要满足小性条件，可以任意大
AI.significance: 为气候建模提供了严格的数学基础，证明了气候系统对周期性强迫的稳定响应，对理解季节变化和长期气候动力学有重要意义

title: Spectral Theory of Krein-Feller Type Operators and Applications in Stochastic Fractional Elliptic and Parabolic Equations
summary: It has been shown that the space $C^{\infty}_{W,V}(\mathbb{T})$, introduced in Simas and Sousa (Potential Analysis, 2025), is the natural regularity space for solutions of the eigenvalue problem $Δ_{W,V} u = λu$ on the torus $\mathbb{T}$, where $Δ_{W,V} = \frac{d^{+}}{dV}\frac{d^{-}}{dW}$ is the Krein Feller operator in the case where $W$ and $V$ are strictly increasing and right continuous (respectively left continuous), possibly with dense sets of discontinuities. In this work we provide conditions ensuring that every function in $C^{\infty}_{W,V}(\mathbb{T})$, which may be highly discontinuous, admits a series expansion that generalizes the classical Taylor expansion. A central feature of our approach is that all proofs are nonstandard, since classical analytical and spectral arguments cannot be adapted to this singular setting. Using these methods we characterize the eigenvectors of $Δ_{W,V}$ in terms of generalized trigonometric functions and obtain an asymptotic lower bound for the associated eigenvalues. We also derive a sharp upper bound for the convergence exponent of these eigenvalues, and as a consequence we prove that $C^{\infty}_{W,V}(\mathbb{T})$ is a nuclear space. Further consequences include results on the asymptotic behavior of eigenvalues of compact operators and improvements in traceability. As a final application we establish existence results for generalized fractional stochastic and deterministic differential equations, as well as for parabolic stochastic partial differential equations acting on nuclear spaces.

AI.tldr: 建立了Krein-Feller算子特征函数的广义泰勒展开理论，并证明了相关函数空间是核空间
AI.motivation: 研究Krein-Feller算子Δ_{W,V}的特征值问题，其中W和V是严格递增且可能具有稠密间断点的函数，需要发展非标准分析方法来处理这种奇异情形
AI.techniques: 非标准分析、广义泰勒展开、核空间理论、特征值渐近分析、广义三角函数方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) C^{∞}_{W,V}(T)中函数的广义泰勒展开存在性；2) Δ_{W,V}特征向量用广义三角函数表征；3) 特征值渐近下界估计；4) 特征值收敛指数的尖锐上界；5) C^{∞}_{W,V}(T)是核空间的证明
AI.significance: 为奇异微分算子的谱理论提供了新框架，建立了核空间与广义随机微分方程的联系，改进了可迹性结果，为分数阶随机偏微分方程提供了存在性理论

title: On hyperbolic approximations for a class of dispersive and diffusive-dispersive equations
summary: We introduce novel approximate systems for dispersive and diffusive-dispersive equations with nonlinear fluxes. For purely dispersive equations, we construct a first-order, strictly hyperbolic approximation. Local well-posedness of smooth solutions is achieved by constructing a unique symmetrizer that applies to arbitrary smooth fluxes. Under stronger conditions on the fluxes, we provide a strictly convex entropy for the hyperbolic system that corresponds to the energy of the underlying dispersive equation. To approximate diffusive-dispersive equations, we rely on a viscoelastic damped system that is compatible with the found entropy for the hyperbolic approximation of the dispersive evolution. For the resulting hyperbolic-parabolic approximation, we provide a global well-posedness result. Using the relative entropy framework \cite{dafermos2005hyperbolic}, we prove that the solutions of the approximate systems converge to solutions of the original equations. The structure of the new approximate systems allows to apply standard numerical simulation methods from the field of hyperbolic balance laws. We confirm the convergence of our approximations even beyond the validity range of our theoretical findings on set of test cases covering different target equations. We show the applicability of the approach for strong nonlinear effects leading to oscillating or shock-layer-forming behavior.

AI.tldr: 提出新型近似系统用于逼近色散和扩散-色散方程，建立严格双曲近似并证明收敛性
AI.motivation: 针对具有非线性通量的色散和扩散-色散方程，传统数值方法难以处理，需要构造既能保持物理结构又便于数值模拟的近似系统
AI.techniques: 构造严格双曲近似系统、唯一对称化子方法、严格凸熵构造、粘弹性阻尼系统、相对熵框架、双曲平衡律标准数值方法
AI.main_theorems: 1) 纯色散方程的一阶严格双曲近似局部适定性；2) 在更强条件下构造对应色散方程能量的严格凸熵；3) 扩散-色散方程的粘弹性阻尼近似全局适定性；4) 相对熵框架下近似系统解收敛到原方程解
AI.significance: 为色散和扩散-色散方程提供了新的理论分析和数值模拟框架，将复杂方程转化为标准双曲平衡律形式，便于应用成熟数值方法，具有重要理论和计算价值

title: Quantitative rigidity of the Wasserstein contraction under convolution
summary: The aim of this paper is to investigate the contraction properties of $p$-Wasserstein distances with respect to convolution in Euclidean spaces both qualitatively and quantitatively. We connect this question to the question of uniform convexity of the Kantorovich functional on which there was substantial recent progress (mostly for $p=2$ and partially for $p>1$). Motivated by this connection we extend these uniform convexity results to the case $p=1$, which is of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 研究了p-Wasserstein距离在卷积运算下的收缩性质，并将此问题与Kantorovich泛函的一致凸性联系起来，特别将p>1的一致凸性结果推广到p=1的情形。
AI.motivation: 研究p-Wasserstein距离在卷积运算下的收缩性质，这涉及到概率测度的正则化效应。该问题与Kantorovich泛函的一致凸性密切相关，而后者在p=2时已有显著进展，p>1也有部分结果，但p=1情形尚未充分研究。
AI.techniques: 将Wasserstein距离的收缩性质与Kantorovich泛函的一致凸性联系起来，利用最优输运理论框架，特别是对p=1情形扩展了已有的凸性分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了p-Wasserstein距离在卷积下收缩性质与Kantorovich泛函一致凸性的联系；2. 将p>1的一致凸性结果推广到p=1情形，这是独立的重要贡献。
AI.significance: 为p=1的Wasserstein距离理论提供了新的凸性结果，深化了对最优输运泛函几何性质的理解，对概率测度的正则化分析和相关PDE研究有重要意义。

title: Existence and a priori bounds for fully nonlinear PDEs with a harmonic map-like structure
summary:
In this paper, we study a new class of fully nonlinear uniformly elliptic equations with a so-called harmonic map-like structure, whose model case is given by \begin{equation*} \mathcal{M}^{\pm}_{λ,Λ}(D^2u) \pm b(x) |Du| \pm β(u)\langle M(x) Du,Du \rangle \pm c(x) u = f(x)\; \textrm{ in } Ω, \end{equation*} where $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^n$ is a bounded $C^{1,1}$ domain, $\mathcal{M}^{\pm}$ are the Pucci extremal operators, $β(s) = s^k$ for some $k \in \mathbb{N} $ odd, $b \in L^{q}_{+}(Ω)$, $c,f \in L^p(Ω)$, and $n \leq p \leq q$, $q>n$.
  We obtain existence results under a smallness regime on the coefficients, along with some classical results such as the Aleksandrov--Bakelman--Pucci estimate and the comparison principle, as well as a priori bounds for the respective Dirichlet problem in the noncoercive case. We also establish multiplicity results and qualitative behavior, which seem to be new in the case of the Laplacian operator.

AI.tldr: 研究具有调和映射结构的一类新型完全非线性一致椭圆方程，在系数小条件下获得存在性、多重性及定性行为结果
AI.motivation: 研究一类新型完全非线性一致椭圆方程，其具有调和映射结构，模型包含Pucci极值算子、梯度项、非线性项和低阶项，在系数满足小条件下探索解的存在性、多重性和定性行为
AI.techniques: 使用Pucci极值算子理论、Aleksandrov-Bakelman-Pucci估计、比较原理、先验估计、拓扑度理论、变分方法，处理非强制Dirichlet问题
AI.main_theorems: 在系数小条件下获得解的存在性结果；建立Aleksandrov-Bakelman-Pucci估计和比较原理；获得非强制情形下Dirichlet问题的先验估计；建立多重性结果和定性行为分析
AI.significance: 扩展了完全非线性椭圆方程理论，特别是具有调和映射结构的方程；为Laplacian算子情形提供了新的多重性结果；发展了处理非强制问题的分析方法

title: Fractured Poroelastic Media in the Limit of Vanishing Aperture
summary: We consider a poroelastic medium with a thin heterogeneity, also referred to as a fracture. Fluid flow and mechanical deformation inside both bulk and fracture are governed by the quasi-static Biot equations. The fracture's material parameters, such as hydraulic conductivity and elasticity, are assumed to scale with powers of the width-to-length ratio $\varepsilon$ of the fracture. Based on a priori estimates, we rigorously derive limit models as $\varepsilon \rightarrow 0$ and identify different limit regimes. We obtain five regimes for the hydraulic conductivity and two for the elasticity. While many cases yield discrete fracture models, others result in two-scale limit problems dominated by normal flow or deformation.

AI.tldr: 严格推导了含薄异质性的多孔弹性介质在裂缝宽度趋于零时的极限模型，识别了不同的极限状态
AI.motivation: 研究含薄裂缝的多孔弹性介质，裂缝材料参数（水力传导率和弹性）随裂缝宽长比ε的幂次变化，需要推导ε→0时的极限模型
AI.techniques: 基于先验估计的严格渐近分析，参数尺度分析，多尺度极限推导，识别不同参数尺度下的极限状态
AI.main_theorems: 获得水力传导率的五种极限状态和弹性的两种极限状态，部分情况得到离散裂缝模型，其他情况得到由法向流动或变形主导的两尺度极限问题
AI.significance: 为含裂缝多孔弹性介质提供了系统的数学理论框架，揭示了不同参数尺度下的物理机制，对地下水流、油气开采等工程应用有重要理论指导意义

title: Geophysical intensity problems: the axisymmetric case
summary:
Considering the earth or any other celestial body the main sources of the gravitational as well as of the magnetic field lie inside the body. Above the surface both fields are in good approximation harmonic vector fields determined by their values at the body's surface or any other surface enclosing the body. The intensity problem seeks to determine harmonic vector fields vanishing at infinity and with prescribed intensity of the field at the surface. This problem constitutes a nonlinear boundary value problem, whose general solvability is not yet established. In this paper {\em axisymmetric} harmonic fields ${ f H}$ outside the unit sphere $S^2$ are studied and, given an axisymmetric Hölder continuous intensity function $I
eq 0$ on $S^2$, the existence of infinitely many solutions of the intensity problem is proved. These solutions can more precisely be characterized as follows: fix a number $\de \in 
at\setminus \{1 \}$ and a meridional plane $M$ through the symmetry axis $S\!A$, and in $M$ a unit circle $S^1$ (symmetric with respect to $S\!A$) and, furthermore, $2\, N$, $N \in 
at_0$, points $z_n \in M$ (symmetric with respect to $S\!A$, avoiding $S\!A$, and outside $S^1$), then the existence of an (up to a sign) unique harmonic field ${ f H}$ is established that vanishes at (the axisymmetric circles piercing $M$ at) $z_n$ and nowhere else, that has intensity $I$ at $S^2$ and (exact) decay order $\de$ at infinity. The proof is based on the solution of a nonlinear elliptic equation with discontinuous coefficients, which are, moreover, singular at the symmetry axis. Its combination with fixed boundary conditions was the basis of a recent treatment of the ``geomagnetic direction problem'' \cite{KR22}. Here we have instead natural boundary conditions, which provide less information, and which require, therefore, in part new solution techniques and sharper estimates.

AI.tldr: 证明了轴对称调和向量场强度问题存在无穷多解，每个解由在无穷远处的衰减阶和有限个零点位置唯一确定
AI.motivation: 研究地球或其他天体外部引力场和磁场的强度问题，这是一个非线性边值问题，其一般可解性尚未建立。考虑轴对称调和向量场在单位球面外的情况，给定轴对称Hölder连续强度函数，证明存在无穷多解。
AI.techniques: 基于非线性椭圆方程（具有不连续系数且在对称轴处奇异）的求解，结合自然边界条件而非固定边界条件，发展了新的解技术和更尖锐的估计方法。
AI.main_theorems: 给定轴对称Hölder连续强度函数I≠0，存在无穷多解：固定衰减阶δ∈ℕ\{1}、对称圆S¹和2N个对称点z_n，则存在（符号唯一）调和场H，在z_n处为零且在其他地方不为零，在S²上具有强度I，在无穷远处具有精确衰减阶δ。
AI.significance: 首次建立了轴对称强度问题解的存在性理论，为地球物理和天体物理中的场反演问题提供了数学基础，扩展了先前"地磁方向问题"的结果，处理了更困难的自然边界条件情况。

title: A Nehari manifold method for nonvariational problems
summary: The aim of this paper is to extend the Nehari manifold method from the variational setting to the nonvariational framework of fixed point equations. This is achieved by constructing a radial energy functional that generalizes the standard one from the variational case. Furthermore, the solutions obtained through our method are localized in conical annular sets, which leads to the existence of multiple solutions. The abstract results are illustrated by two representative applications.

AI.tldr: 将Nehari流形方法从变分框架推广到不动点方程的非变分框架，通过构造径向能量泛函获得多解存在性
AI.motivation: Nehari流形方法是变分问题中寻找临界点的有效工具，但局限于变分框架。本文旨在将该方法推广到非变分的不动点方程框架，扩展其应用范围。
AI.techniques: 构造径向能量泛函推广变分情形下的标准能量泛函；利用Nehari流形方法在非变分框架下的变形；通过解在锥形环形区域中的局部化获得多解
AI.main_theorems: 建立了非变分框架下Nehari流形方法的一般理论；证明了不动点方程多解的存在性定理；解具有在锥形环形区域中局部化的特性
AI.significance: 将经典变分方法推广到更广泛的非变分框架，为非线性分析提供了新工具；通过两个代表性应用展示了方法的有效性；为研究非变分问题中的多解存在性开辟了新途径

title: Mean curvature flow near a peanut solution
summary: It was shown by Angenent, Altschuler and Giga, and by Angenent and Velazquez that there exist closed mean curvature flow solutions that extinct to a point in finite time, without ever becoming convex prior to their extinction. These solutions develop a degenerate neckpinch singularity, meaning that the tangent flow at a singularity is a round cylinder, but at the same time for each of these solutions there exists a sequence of points in space and time, so that the pointed blow up limit around this sequence is the Bowl soliton. These solutions are called peanut solutions and they were first conjectured to exist by Richard Hamilton, while the existence of those solutions was shown by Angenent, Altschuler and Giga. In this paper we show that this type of solutions are highly unstable, in the sense that in every small neighborhood of any such peanut solution we can find a perturbation so that the mean curvature flow starting at that perturbation develops spherical singularity, and at the same time we can find a perturbation so that the mean curvature flow starting at that perturbation develops a nondegenerate neckpinch singularity. We also show that appropriately rescaled subsequence of any sequence of solutions whose initial data converge to the peanut solution, and all of which develop spherical singularities, converges to the Ancient oval solution.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了花生型平均曲率流解的高度不稳定性，并建立了其扰动解与球形奇点、非退化颈缩奇点以及古代卵形解之间的收敛关系。
AI.motivation: 研究花生型平均曲率流解的稳定性问题。花生型解是Hamilton猜想并由Angenent等人证明存在的特殊闭平均曲率流解，它们在有限时间内收缩到一点但从不凸，具有退化颈缩奇点。本文旨在分析这类解的稳定性性质。
AI.techniques: 使用扰动分析、奇点分析、缩放极限技术，研究解在花生型解邻域内的行为，建立收敛到球形奇点、非退化颈缩奇点以及古代卵形解的关系。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 花生型解高度不稳定：在其任意小邻域内存在扰动，使得平均曲率流分别发展出球形奇点和非退化颈缩奇点。2. 收敛性结果：初始数据收敛到花生型解且都发展球形奇点的解序列，其适当缩放子序列收敛到古代卵形解。
AI.significance: 深化了对平均曲率流奇点分类和稳定性的理解，建立了花生型解与球形奇点、非退化颈缩奇点及古代卵形解之间的精确关系，为奇点分析和稳定性理论提供了重要结果。
